If you only use group polls, there’s more you’ll want to try

Hi User,

Example can do more than help a group pick a time. If you coordinate recurring meetings or quick 1:1s, a few extra features can make scheduling much simpler.

Here are three to try next:
✅ Booking Page: Define your availability once and let others pick a time
✅ Sign-up Sheet: Collect names for shifts, sessions, or event slots
✅ 1:1 Scheduling: Replace the “what time works” thread with a booking link

Teams that adopt these options book faster and keep plans moving.

 
Explore more ways to meet
 

 
You’re receiving this email because you signed up to hear from Example.
